toss_philter.name: Toss Philter
toss_philter.description: Setup/Builder: Toss a basic alchemical philter. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Reagent Pip.

catalyze.name: Catalyze
catalyze.description: Setup: Accelerate the target's reactions. Generates 2 Reagent Pips and marks the target.

acid_flask.name: Acid Flask
acid_flask.description: Payoff: A concentrated acid burst. Consumes 5 Reagent Pips to deal Physical damage and ignore 100% of target armor.

healing_mist.name: Healing Mist
healing_mist.description: Payoff/AOE: A mist of restorative compounds. Consumes 3 Reagent Pips to heal all allies in the room for 5% per tick for 10 ticks.

smoke_bomb_defense.name: Smoke Screen
smoke_bomb_defense.description: Defense: Break an obscure compound at your feet. Grants [Concealed] to self and [Blinded] to target.

concoction_shield.name: Concoction Shield
concoction_shield.description: Defense: Coat yourself in a protective gel. Reduces incoming magic damage by 40% for 6 ticks.

reagent_dash.name: Reagent Dash
reagent_dash.description: Mobility: Consume a haste philter to move instantly between rooms.

ultimate_compound.name: Ultimate Compound
ultimate_compound.description: Utility/Signature: Your Reagent Pip costs are reduced to 0 for 15 ticks.

chemist_physiology.name: Chemist Physiology
chemist_physiology.description: Passive: Master Alchemist. You gain 10% bonus Pacing power and every time you use a Reagent Pip, you heal for 2% of your Max HP.
